title: osmanthus ilicifolius f. variegatus
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius f. variegatus, also known as the variegated tea olive, is a variety of flowering shrub native to Asia, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and attractive variegated foliage. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Osmanthus ilicifolius f. variegatus have been used in herbal medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Osmanthus ilicifolius f. variegatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
